steps.title: Trace the food-chain effect
steps.content: The text says baleen whales cycle iron, which supports phytoplankton, and phytoplankton sustain krill. If whale populations declined, that would likely reduce iron cycling, then phytoplankton, and finally krill.

steps.title: Stay within the chain
steps.content: A discusses whale body size, which the text does not say changed. B says krill needs per whale increased, but the text gives no such trend. C concerns the iron richness of krill, not the phytoplankton support chain. The remaining choice follows the causal chain described in the text. The answer is D.
